clock_timestamp_discrepancy.field: audit_time_utc in the sealed pre-edit audit
clock_timestamp_discrepancy.explanation: The sealed pre-edit audit's audit_time_utc reads 2026-07-13, which predates the true artifact time (SEAL.txt sealed_at_utc=2026-07-17T06:40:13Z; build/replay also on 2026-07-17). The value was carried over from earlier same-session artifacts and is EARLIER than the real clock. Per the human directive, the sealed files were NOT modified to correct this; the discrepancy is disclosed here instead. It does not affect any finding, SHA, or verdict.

fixes_applied.how: BLOCKED requires structured semantic failure_code (in allowed set) + hits_match; run_mutation_tests.py parses RESULT_JSON, no longer trusts bare exit 1.
m2 -> 'THEN 1' (SQL-valid); trigger present, cross-store write succeeds; detector emits E-CROSS-STORE-SEMANTIC-BYPASS.
m6 special fully removes the trigger block; schema initialises; detector emits E-CROSS-STORE-TRIGGER-MISSING.
m10 -> syntax-valid 'True'; `if not True:` truly bypasses verify; E-RECOVERY-PROVIDER-VERIFY-BYPASS.
Exit taxonomy 0/1/2/3; detectors never turn an exception into a security FAIL; vault isolates 24 items.
check_security builds real model objects and calls real write paths; only ValueError accepted; TypeError/etc = ERROR.
check_cross_store accepts only sqlite3.IntegrityError with E-SCOPE; others = ERROR.
Report carries started_at/ended_at/duration_ms/timed_out/signal, argv detector_command, normal-before/after raw logs+SHA, selector self-test.
Single build produces closed manifest (0/0/0) + required deliverables; final ZIP contains mutation_report.json.
build_id injected by top-level build; default (replay) compares only a volatile-free stable_signature.

frozen_scope_note: No changes to app/daily_loop/services/*, migration SQL, tests/* business assertions, restore fault-injection semantics, or vendor. Mutations edit production files only on throwaway temp copies.
